system.description:
The smallest of the fair folk. Whimsical and unpredictable. Pixies are usually considered harmless, but can be surprisingly competent in combat – especially if mistaken for an insect.

Tricksy

-1 Speed. [A]

You have a fly Speed as long as you are wearing armor no heavier than leather. [A]

Advantage on Stealth. [A]

You know Elvish if your INT isn't negative. [A]
